title: Zuri's Peek-a-Boo Seasons
synopsis: Baby Zuri discovers the magic of seasons through peek-a-boo games with nature, from spring flowers to winter snow.

pages.text: Peek-a-boo! Spring flowers say hello to Zuri!

illustration.description: Zuri with natural coily hair in an afro with a flower clip, deep brown skin, bright eyes, playing peek-a-boo behind blooming pink cherry blossoms in a garden setting with soft spring pastels
illustration.alt: Zuri hiding behind spring flowers playing peek-a-boo

pages.text: Where is Zuri? Behind the big green leaves! Peek-a-boo!

illustration.description: Zuri with natural coily hair in an afro with a flower clip, deep brown skin, bright eyes, peeking out from behind large summer green leaves with bright summer colors and sunshine

pages.text: Autumn leaves are falling! Peek-a-boo, Zuri sees you!

illustration.description: Zuri with natural coily hair in an afro with a flower clip, deep brown skin, bright eyes, playing in a pile of warm autumn colored leaves - orange, red, and gold
illustration.alt: Zuri playing peek-a-boo in autumn leaves

pages.text: Brrr! Winter snow covers everything. Where did Zuri go? Peek-a-boo!

illustration.description: Zuri with natural coily hair in an afro with a flower clip, deep brown skin, bright eyes, bundled in winter clothes peeking out from behind a snow-covered tree with cool winter blues and whites
illustration.alt: Zuri hiding behind snowy tree in winter

metadata.illustrationStyle: seasonal cycle, spring pastels, summer brights, autumn warmth, winter cool, same scene different seasons, time passing, nature calendar, cyclical beauty

questions.question: What season has pink flowers?
questions.explanation: Spring is when flowers bloom and everything turns green!

questions.question: What falls from trees in autumn?
questions.explanation: In autumn, colorful leaves fall from the trees!

questions.question: What covers the ground in winter?
questions.explanation: Winter brings cold weather and white snow!
